use_codes.desc: MEMANTINE HCL/DONEPEZIL HCL COMBINATION FOR THE TREATMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE DEMENTIA OF THE ALZHEIMER'S TYPE

indications.text:
NAMZARIC is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe dementia of the Alzheimer’s
type in patients stabilized on 10 mg of donepezil hydrochloride once daily.

NAMZARIC is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe dementia of the Alzheimer’s type
in patients stabilized on:
• memantine hydrochloride (10 mg twice daily or 28 mg extended-release once daily) and
donepezil hydrochloride 10 mg.
• memantine hydrochloride (5 mg twice daily or 14 mg extende...
